impact: The daemon was stuck calling the LLM on checkbox-62 without accepting patches. This board change gives the next cycle a deterministic supervisor repair first, then resumes the original fixture-only DevHub task with a smaller file set and explicit no-live-session guardrails.
summary: Replan the active DevHub fixture task behind a narrow daemon prompt/preflight repair for repeated no-accepted-patch LLM rounds.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
